name: Idaho ladder fall at work—can I sue the property owner?

mainEntity.name: Idaho ladder fall at work—can I sue the property owner?

acceptedAnswer.description:
Yes, if owner failed safe conditions; Idaho allows third-party claims beyond comp for negligence.[2]

Ladders under owner/contractor duty; Boise cases pursue this.[1]

- Prove lack of protection.
- 2-year statute.
- Full damages possible.

Local lawyer assesses owner liability.[3]
